scenario.name: IMS Call UAS Demo
scenario.send: SIP/2.0 100 Trying [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] User-Agent: IM-client/OMA1.0 SIPp-Demo/1.0 Content-Length: 0

SIP/2.0 180 Ringing [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> User-Agent: IM-client/OMA1.0 SIPp-Demo/1.0 Content-Length: 0

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> User-Agent: IM-client/OMA1.0 SIPp-Demo/1.0 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=uas 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 96 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:96 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:96 0-15 a=sendrecv a=ptime:20
SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] User-Agent: IM-client/OMA1.0 SIPp-Demo/1.0 Content-Length: 0
